candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Cross-pollinate top strategy (wedge_exhaustion_reversal) with runner-up doctrine (mean_reversion_liquidity_reclaim).
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Cross-mutation of the two best-performing candidates may combine their strengths.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Rotate into a higher-volatility breakout lane that actually improves the benchmark frontier.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: The current trend/EMA baseline is too flat on this scenario, so a volatility-expansion doctrine with a squeeze breakout should lift profitability without relying on the stalled 4h continuation template.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Probe whether funding dislocations work better under a range doctrine.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: If the baseline is overfit to trend continuation, a range/funding lane should improve trade density and reduce flat benchmark outcomes.
